creator: ixbug@riseup.net
text:
On 2018-11-09 Intel released version 6.80
(FreeBSD currently ships 6.01).

This update might help solve a severe issue causing "Malicious Driver Detection events".
https://communities.intel.com/message/594608#594608

https://communities.intel.com/external-link.jspa?url=https%3A%2F%2Fdownloadcenter.intel.com%2Fdownload%2F22283%2FEthernet-Intel-Ethernet-Adapter-Complete-Driver-Pack
